title: ST19 5PT, Abbey Foods Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/NP3427SC/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Abbey Foods Limited   Installation name: Gailey Poultry Unit   Permit number: EPR/NP3427SC/A001   "
